data.html_notes:
Steps
  1. Open app
  2. Login
  3. Send <0.1 XAUT Plasma
  4. Observe the 'transfer is about to be initiated' notification
Actual result: 'A transfer of 8e-7XAUT on Plasma is about to be initiated' Expected result: 'A transfer of 0.01 XAUT on Plasma is about to be initiated' (please advise here @Eddy WM) Notes Environment: prod (internal testing) Build: v2.0.4 (199) Device: iOS iPhone 15 26.1 User credentials with <0.1 Plasma: username: masharumble password: Qwerty123! secret phrase: clay involve unhappy tone now glad science lesson laptop bone dog token (funds are on the mtester1001 tip jar)
